summary: Iteration 17 - Video Upload Support & Promo/Card Selection on Appointments. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend video upload support, promo/card selection in appointment dialog, and video rendering code verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Video upload support: POST /api/website/upload correctly accepts mp4, webm, mov files and returns file_type='video'
Gallery storage: POST /api/website/gallery correctly stores file_type field
Appointment promo/card: POST /api/appointments correctly accepts and stores promo_id, card_id fields
Appointment response: GET /api/appointments returns promo_id, promo_name, card_id, card_name fields
WebsiteAdminPage: Upload buttons accept video types (accept='image/*,video/mp4,video/webm,video/quicktime')
WebsiteAdminPage: VIDEO badge shown on video items (file_type === 'video')
PlanningPage: 'Card & Promozioni Disponibili' section shows client's eligible promos and cards when selecting a client
PlanningPage: preSelectedCardId and preSelectedPromoId saved to appointment payload (promo_id, card_id)
BookingPage/WebsitePage: Video rendering code implemented with <video> tag for file_type='video' items
No video files currently in gallery database, but code correctly implements video support
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test appointments cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video upload support fully implemented in backend and frontend. Upload endpoint returns file_type='video' for mp4/webm/mov files. Gallery items store file_type field. Appointment model has promo_id, card_id fields that resolve to promo_name, card_name. PlanningPage shows 'Card & Promozioni Disponibili' section when selecting a client with eligible promos. Current gallery has 8 image items (4 salon photos, 4 works photos) - no video files uploaded yet.

backend_gallery.get_returns_file_type: PASS - Gallery items include file_type field

backend_appointments.create_with_both: PASS - Both promo_id and card_id saved with names
backend_appointments.get_returns_all_fields: PASS - promo_id, promo_name, card_id, card_name returned

backend_promotions.check_client_promos: PASS - Returns eligible promos for client

frontend_website_admin.video_badge_shown: PASS - VIDEO badge code present for file_type='video'

frontend_planning.card_promo_section_appears: PASS - 'Card & Promozioni Disponibili' shown with promos

frontend_public_pages.video_rendering_code: PASS - <video> tag used for file_type='video' items
